title: untrack
description: Reads signals without creating reactive dependencies.
param_fn_desc: Function to run without tracking. Signal reads inside won't register dependencies.
heading_reading_aside: Reading a value on the side
usage_reading_aside: The uptime monitor logs a transition only when a check's <0>status</0> changes. It still needs the latest latency for the message, so it reads <1>latest()</1> through <2>untrack</2>, keeping latency out of the effect's dependencies while status alone drives the re-run.
in_the_wild: See this transition log in the <0>uptime-monitor walkthrough</0>.
